trump_iran_deal.content: Trump warns Iran: US ready to resume war if no deal reached soon. BREAKING
Highly unlikely Iran ceasefire will be extended if no deal reached, Trump says
What if the Iran deal does not happen under Trump? Will it be a long war like Vietnam and Afghanistan?

iran_ceasefire.content: Ex-CENTCOM commander warns against risky US ground operation to seize Iran enriched uranium. Two-week ceasefire expires Wednesday, no extension expected.
Iran framing action as clear ceasefire violation. Which ceasefire from April 2026? How fragile does truce look before Pakistan talks?

iran_war.content: China supports Russia in Ukraine war. Russia helping Iran regime against US. Trump likes Putin.

KobeissiLetter.content: Strong inverse correlation between US diesel prices and Consumer Sentiment. Trucking costs up 30%. Americans spent extra 10 billion USD on gasoline over 50 days. Consumer Sentiment at record low.
World experiencing biggest energy crisis in history with 600 million barrels of lost oil supply. US gas prices up 47 percent since December. Inflation nearing 4 percent similar to 1970s.
